query: Boeing MQ-28 Ghost Bat Valiant Shield 2026 U.S. Air Force multinational joint force first collaborative combat aircraft details

mako.raw:
{"query":"Boeing MQ-28 Ghost Bat Valiant Shield 2026 U.S. Air Force multinational joint force first collaborative combat aircraft details","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1801,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://avweb.com/aviation-news/military-aviation/boeing-mq-28-flies-with-air-force/","title":"Boeing MQ-28 Flies With U.S. Air Force In Indo-Pacific Exercise","content":"“Having MQ-28 participate in such a significant military training exercise is a first, and this is just the start of demonstrating how advanced human-machine teaming extends the reach and awareness of crewed platforms and enhances joint force operations,” Steve Parker, president and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security, said."},{"url":"https://theaircurrent.com/defense/first-us-deployment-collaborative-combat-aircraft-boeing-mq-28-valiant-shield/","title":"The surprising first U.S. deployment of a collaborative combat aircraft","content":"Boeing’s MQ-28A Ghost Bat is serving as a “loyal wingman” to piloted fighter jets during Valiant Shield 2026, a multinational combat simulation taking place from June 22 to July 1 that tests the Pentagon’s strategy to confront a rising China.
The Air Force’s goal for the deployment of the production-ready MQ-28 is to inform requirements for its ongoing procurement of potentially thousands of CCA aircraft, pushing the service a step closer to understanding how to properly field loyal wingman fighters, a component of future force projection that the Pentagon sees as key to confronting peer adversaries in the Pacific."},{"url":"https://www.joint-forces.com/world-news/defence-news/92655-boeing-mq-28-participates-in-valiant-shield-2026","title":"Boeing MQ-28 Participates in VALIANT SHIELD 2026 | Joint Forces News","content":"Press Release, Hawaii, 07 July 2026: Boeing’s MQ-28 Ghost Bat has participated in Exercise VALIANT SHIELD alongside F-35A, F-35B, F-15EX, HC-130, E-3, E-2D, EA-18G, RC-135, and various other joint and coalition aircraft becoming the first and only collaborative combat aircraft (CCA) deployed to a multinational, joint operational exercise.
During VALIANT SHIELD 2026 in June, the Australian-developed MQ-28 Ghost Bat integrated with forces from the US Pacific Command to support the US Air Force’s Experimental Operations Unit’s CCA integration objectives.
¤ VALIANT SHIELD is a biennial exercise focused on integrating the joint force, fostering real-world proficiency in detecting, locating, tracking, and engaging units at sea, in the air, on land, and in cyberspace in response to a range of mission areas."},{"url":"https://militaryembedded.com/unmanned/test/collaborative-combat-aircraft-flown-in-exercise-valiant-shield-2026-by-boeing","title":"Collaborative combat aircraft flown in Exercise Valiant Shield 2026 by Boeing - Military Embedded Systems","content":"The aircraft participated in operations around the Marianas Island Range Complex in the Western Pacific region as crews worked on tactics, techniques, and procedures for CCA integration, according to the statement.
The exercise provided data on deployment, sustainment, and agile combat employment for the MQ-28, the company says.
Boeing says the aircraft is designed to team with fourth-, fifth-, and sixth-generation aircraft."},{"url":"https://migflug.com/jetflights/ghost-bat-mq-28-debuts-valiant-shield-2026/","title":"Ghost Bat Goes to War: MQ-28 Debuts at Valiant Shield | Afterburner - MiGFlug's Magazine","content":"Aircraft: Boeing Defence Australia MQ-28A Ghost Bat (production representative test aircraft ATS-008)
Over 150 test sorties and 20,000 hours of digital validation have brought the MQ-28 to this point.
The MQ-28A Ghost Bat is an autonomous combat drone developed by Boeing Defence Australia.
The Ghost Bat has demonstrated it alongside crewed jets, including in its first teaming with an F-15EX.
The 2026 edition ran from 23 June to 1 July across the Mariana Islands, Guam, Hawaii, Japan and Australia, with forces from the United States, Australia, Japan, Canada and New Zealand operating under integrated multi-domain conditions.
During Valiant Shield 2026 the MQ-28 flew alongside crewed F-22 Raptors and F-35A Lightning IIs in both defensive and offensive counter-air missions."},{"url":"https://www.flightlineweekly.com/post/boeing-mq-28-ghost-bat-demonstrates-collaborative-combat-capability","title":"Boeing MQ-28 Ghost Bat Demonstrates Collaborative ...","date":"3 days ago","content":"3 days ago — The aircraft is intended to operate alongside fourth, fifth and eventually sixth-generation combat aircraft, carrying sensors, electronic ...Read more"}]}

Boeing’s MQ-28 Ghost Bat flew alongside U.S. Air Force and coalition aircraft during Exercise Valiant Shield 2026, becoming the first collaborative combat aircraft to take part in the multinational joint force exercise.","score":0.92980474,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/Boeing/posts/mq-28-ghost-bat-is-the-first-and-only-collaborative-combat-aircraft-integrated-i/1486010150220248","title":"MQ-28 Ghost Bat is the first and only... - The Boeing Company","content":"## The Boeing Company's Post. ### **The Boeing Company**. MQ-28 Ghost Bat is the first and only collaborative combat aircraft integrated into a multinational, joint force exercise at Valiant Shield 2026.
